meta.title: GitFolder — Automatic version history for your folders
meta.description: GitFolder watches selected folders on your Mac and creates quiet GitHub snapshot commits when files change. Local-first, no account, uses your own git.

hero.title: Automatic version history for your folders.
hero.subtitle: GitFolder watches selected folders on your Mac and creates quiet GitHub snapshot commits when files change. No cloud service. No account. Just local-first versioning.
hero.download: Download on the Mac App Store

steps.title: Simple app, simple setup
steps.subtitle: Pick a folder, connect a GitHub repo, choose an interval. That's it.

items.title: Pick a folder
items.desc: Choose any folder on your Mac you want versioned.

items.title: Connect a repo
items.desc: Point it at a GitHub repository you own, using your existing SSH access.

items.title: Choose an interval
items.desc: Set how often it snapshots — then forget about it.

features.title: Everything it does
features.subtitle: A small macOS app that does one thing well.

items.title: Select your folders
items.desc: Pick any folder on your Mac. GitFolder watches it and creates snapshot commits when files change.

items.title: Your GitHub, your repos
items.desc: Uses your existing GitHub SSH setup. Files go only to repositories you choose — nothing touches GitFolder servers.

items.title: Automatic intervals
items.desc: Set sync intervals per folder — 5, 15, 30, or 60 minutes. GitFolder works quietly in the background.

items.title: Local-first and private
items.desc: No GitFolder account needed. No cloud service. Your files move directly from your Mac to your GitHub repos.

items.title: Uses your Git setup
items.desc: Leverages the Git and SSH configuration you already have. No bundled Git, no separate keys unless you want them.

items.title: Menu bar app
items.desc: Lives in the macOS menu bar. Check sync status, pause syncing, or trigger a manual sync — all from the menu.

cta.title: Version your folders, quietly.
cta.subtitle: Available now on the Mac App Store.
cta.download: Download on the Mac App Store
